meaning: n.接近,逼近,走进,方法,步骤,途径,通路vt.接近,动手处理vi.靠近
examples: I have an analytical approach to every survey.
There's a certain novelty value in this approach.
He took a very scientific approach to management.
It's an approach that echoes the renaissance of vinyl records among hip young aesthetes.
The advantage of this approach is that it retains the basic fibre-plus-matrix structure of the material.
